summary: Kanban Card Container Affordance Testing Complete - All 11/11 features verified. Cards now have proper visual affordance: white background, 10px border-radius, subtle border (1px solid rgba(226,232,240,0.7)), box-shadow (0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05)), 12px padding, cursor:grab. 8px gap between cards confirmed. Hover effect increases shadow. Drag functionality shows cursor:grabbing and scale(1.02). Content remains simplified (logo + name + status + optional context). Priority view unchanged with full action UI (Take Action, Re-engage, Start Outreach, timing labels, owner tags).
critical_code_review_comments: kb-card CSS class correctly implements: background:#fff, border:1px solid rgba(226,232,240,0.7), border-radius:10px, box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05), cursor:grab
Hover effect properly increases shadow to 0 3px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.08), 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.04)
Inline padding changed from 8px to 12px in KanbanCard style prop
Card container gap correctly set to 8 in JSX (gap: 8)
Drag state applies cursor:grabbing and scale(1.02) transform via composedTransform
Elevated shadow during drag: 0 12px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.14), 0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.06)
Previous CARD_PAD constant removed, background:transparent override removed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Kanban card container affordance complete. All visual styling verified: (1) White background rgb(255,255,255), (2) Border radius 10px, (3) Subtle border 1px solid rgba(226,232,240,0.7), (4) Box shadow rgba(0,0,0,0.05) 0px 1px 2px, (5) Padding 12px, (6) Cursor grab (grabbing when dragging), (7) Card gap 8px between cards, (8) Hover increases shadow, (9) Drag applies scale(1.02) + elevated shadow, (10) Content simplified (no CTAs/timing/owner), (11) Card click navigation works. Priority view unchanged with full action UI. 7 cards across 5 columns.

verified_features.7_card_gap_8px: PASS - gap: 8px verified in computed styles
verified_features.8_hover_shadow_increases: PASS - Shadow changes from 0 1px 2px to 0 3px 8px on hover
verified_features.9_drag_scale_and_shadow: PASS - scale(1.02) + elevated shadow during drag
verified_features.10_simplified_content: PASS - No CTAs, timing labels, or owner tags on Kanban cards
verified_features.12_priority_view_unchanged: PASS - Priority view has Take Action, Re-engage, Start Outreach, timing labels, owner tags
